name: Katie Carr
title: Director of Field Services
bio:
As Director of Field Services at Birdsey Group, Katie Carr oversees the coordination and execution of field-related services that support underwriting, due diligence, and asset-level decision-making. She helps ensure field work is completed with accuracy, responsiveness, and clear communication.

Katie’s role reinforces the Birdsey Standard through quality execution, accountability, and disciplined coordination.
